Premium Airdrop Number

Airdrop is available only for holders of the old +888 number collection. The number of numbers available for claim is limited, after claim 5000 numbers, the distribution will be closed.

+999 **********

Once the number is obtained, its transfer and sale will be limited for one month. You will be able to use the number immediately. It will have all the same functions as the old collection.
